code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i <= n
    let b = if i == n
      32
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        32
      end
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(cur)
        let v = match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut m = 0
  mut first = true
  mut j = 0
  let ln = nums.len()
  while j < ln
    let x = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if first
      m = x
      first = false
    else if x > m
      m = x
    end
    if j == 0
      out = "#{m}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{m}"
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  println(out)
end
